input.prompt: What is written on this page? Provide the main content and text visible.

content.content:
# Page Content Summary

This is a French-language webpage titled "Vous Etes Perdu?" (Are You Lost?). 

The main text includes:
- A heading asking "Perdu sur l'Internet?" ("Lost on the Internet?")
- A reassuring message stating "Pas de panique, on va vous aider" ("Don't worry, we're going to help you")
- A simple ASCII diagram with an arrow and text indicating "vous êtes ici" ("you are here")

The page appears to be a humorous or minimalist "404 error" or lost/confused visitor page, designed to acknowledge when someone has navigated to an unexpected location online while offering a lighthearted tone rather than providing actual navigation assistance.

content.text:
The page at https://perdu.com is a minimalist French-language joke page. It says:

- **Title**: "Vous Etes Perdu?" (Are You Lost?)
- **Main message**: "Perdu sur l'Internet?" (Lost on the Internet?) followed by "Pas de panique, on va vous aider" (Don't worry, we're going to help you)
- **Visual element**: A simple ASCII diagram with an arrow and "vous êtes ici" (you are here)

It's a humorous page designed to playfully acknowledge when someone has landed on an unexpected location online, with a lighthearted tone rather than providing actual navigation help.
